series_metadata.series_title: Application for Certificate of Plan Approval and Occupancy
series_metadata.series_description: Application file consists of plans, specifications, correspondence, and associated documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: The record shall be retained for one year after a Certificate of Occupancy is issued; one year after the expiration/invalidation of plan approval or application, including any renewal/extension periods; or one year after all appeals or hearing opportunities have expired following an adjudication order denying plan approval. ; Paper: If the paper copy is imaged and indexed into a machine readable format for retention, then upon confirmation that the paper copy was imaged and indexed into a machine readable format, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If the paper copy is not imaged and indexed into a machine readable format for retention, then the record shall be retained for one year after a Certificate of Occupancy is issued; one year after the expiration/invalidation of plan approval or application, including any renewal/extension periods; or one year after all appeals or hearing opportunities have expired following an adjudication order denying plan approval., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Recycle
